allow: PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@habesha.com","password":"admin1234"}'; $temp = New-TemporaryFile; Set-Content $temp $body -Encoding ascii; $loginJson = curl.exe -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary "@$temp"; Remove-Item $temp; $token = \($loginJson | ConvertFrom-Json\).access_token; Write-Output "=== payment-accounts \(empty\) ==="; curl.exe -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/core/payment-accounts/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== telegram-config \(none yet\) ==="; curl.exe -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/core/telegram-config/ -H "Authorization: Bearer $token"; Write-Output "")
